title: gitmap probe --json
description: Machine-readable shape emitted by `gitmap probe --json`. Top-level is an array of per-repository version-probe results. Empty result encodes as `[]`.

repoId.description: SQLite row ID of the scanned repository.

absolutePath.description: Absolute filesystem path where the repository is (or was) cloned.

nextVersionTag.description: The next available version tag (e.g. 'v1.2.3'). Empty when none exists.

nextVersionNum.description: Numeric representation of nextVersionTag for sortable comparisons. Zero when none exists.

isAvailable.description: True when a newer version tag was found.

error.description: Human-readable error message when the probe failed. Empty on success.
